en: Quiet down people! My name is Mr. Abagnale. That's Abagnale, not Abagnali, not Abagnali,
but Abagnale. Will somebody please tell me where you left off in your textbooks?
Excuse me people, if I need to ask again, I'm going to write up the entire class. Take your seats!
Chapter 7. Will you please open your textbooks to chapter 8 and we'll get started?
Excuse me, what's your name? Brad.
Brad, why don't you get up here, in front of the class here, and read conversation number 5.
